HERO.TITLE: Justice. Integrity. Results.
HERO.SUBTITLE: Trusted legal counsel for individuals and businesses. We fight for your rights with dedication and expertise.

ABOUT.LABEL: About Us
ABOUT.TITLE: Decades of Legal Excellence
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: With over 25 years of combined experience, our team of dedicated attorneys has successfully represented thousands of clients across a wide range of legal matters. We believe in a client-first approach, ensuring that every case receives the personal attention and strategic thinking it deserves.
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION_2: Our firm was founded on the principle that everyone deserves access to exceptional legal representation. We combine deep legal knowledge with a genuine passion for justice.

SERVICES.LABEL: Our Services
SERVICES.TITLE: Areas of Practice
SERVICES.SUBTITLE: We provide comprehensive legal services tailored to meet the unique needs of each client.

CORPORATE.TITLE: Corporate Law
CORPORATE.DESCRIPTION: Expert guidance in business formation, mergers & acquisitions, corporate governance, and commercial transactions.

FAMILY.TITLE: Family Law
FAMILY.DESCRIPTION: Compassionate representation in divorce, child custody, adoption, and other family matters.

CRIMINAL.TITLE: Criminal Defense
CRIMINAL.DESCRIPTION: Vigorous defense of your rights in criminal proceedings, from misdemeanors to complex felony cases.

REAL_ESTATE.TITLE: Real Estate
REAL_ESTATE.DESCRIPTION: Comprehensive legal support for property transactions, disputes, zoning issues, and land use matters.

IMMIGRATION.TITLE: Immigration Law
IMMIGRATION.DESCRIPTION: Navigating complex immigration processes including visas, green cards, citizenship, and asylum cases.

INTELLECTUAL.TITLE: Intellectual Property
INTELLECTUAL.DESCRIPTION: Protection of your creative assets through patents, trademarks, copyrights, and trade secret litigation.

LAWYERS.LABEL: Our Lawyers
LAWYERS.TITLE: Meet Our Attorneys
LAWYERS.SUBTITLE: Experienced professionals committed to protecting your rights and delivering exceptional results.

LAWYER_1.NAME: David Kapanadze
LAWYER_1.DESCRIPTION: With 18 years of experience in corporate law and M&A, David has led over 200 high-profile transactions and serves as trusted counsel to Fortune 500 companies.

LAWYER_2.NAME: Nino Beridze
LAWYER_2.DESCRIPTION: Nino brings 15 years of compassionate yet fierce advocacy in family and immigration cases. She has successfully reunited hundreds of families.

LAWYER_3.NAME: Giorgi Lomidze
LAWYER_3.DESCRIPTION: A seasoned trial attorney with a 95% acquittal rate, Giorgi has 12 years of experience defending clients in complex criminal and civil litigation.

CONTACT.LABEL: Contact Us
CONTACT.TITLE: Get in Touch
CONTACT.SUBTITLE: Schedule a consultation or send us a message. We're here to help with your legal needs.
CONTACT.NAME: Full Name

FOOTER.DESCRIPTION: Providing exceptional legal services with integrity, dedication, and a commitment to justice for over two decades.
